descriptionShort: Box scores from Richmond Sockeyes playoff games against Red Deer, April 11-12, 1987.
descriptionLong: Detailed box scores covering Richmond's playoff series against Red Deer Rebels in April 1987. Saturday, April 11: Richmond lost 3-6 to Red Deer. Sunday, April 12: Richmond lost 1-7 to Red Deer. Includes period-by-period scoring, goal scorers with assists, penalties, and shots on goal. Series tied 2-2 entering Game 5 scheduled for Tuesday.
